actions.description:
### If you think this is incorrect

If you believe you've not been vaccinated against COVID-19, speak to your healthcare professional.

For anything else, visit our [help and support page](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/nhs-app-help-and-support/).

processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the COVID-19 vaccine

suitabilityRules.ruleText:
## You've had your COVID-19 vaccination

We believe you were vaccinated against COVID-19 on 1 October 2025
